description: Lock this batch of contextual edge removals so broad neighboring practices do not return as direct prerequisites.

checks.reason: Native precious-metal working should not require casting and molding as its direct mechanism.
Precious-metal working should not directly require a separate prospecting practice.
Coal extraction predates and exceeds pump-drainage infrastructure, so pumps should not be direct.
Coal mining should not directly require a building-frame technology.
Paracelsian iatrochemistry is chemical medicine rather than herbal practice.
Paracelsian iatrochemistry should not require anatomical reform as a direct input.
Generic philosophy is too broad for the Reformation's direct textual and dissemination mechanisms.
Renaissance vernacular literature is cultural context, not a direct Reformation prerequisite.
Shipboard record keeping should not directly require a specific map projection.
Naval logbooks should not be restricted to a specific vessel design family.
Gresham-style public lectures precede later scientific societies and should not require them.
Public lecture institutions should not directly require printed textbook standardization.
